Wyoming Final Paycheck Law 2026
Your Wyoming final-pay deadline, the wages that must be included, and your options for a late paycheck.
If you were terminated
Within 5 business days
If you resigned
Within 5 business days
How to audit a Wyoming final paycheck
Wyoming separates final pay from the ordinary payroll cycle when the statute says so. The same deadline applies whether the worker was terminated or resigned: within 5 business days. The safest audit is to line up last day worked, separation...
